name: file-input
title: File input
description: Native input[type=file] inside a clickable, keyboard-operable drop zone with an enhancement-only drag target, a live-announced list of selected files with per-file Remove buttons, and multiple/accept passthrough. Integrates with Field.
useWhen: Letting a resident attach one or more documents to a form (permit application, evidence, photos)
Accepting an upload where drag-and-drop is a convenience but must not be the only way
Showing which files are staged, with a way to remove each before submitting
avoidWhen: Capturing a photo directly from a device camera (use a dedicated capture input)
Selecting from files already stored in the app (that is a picker/list, not an upload)
Enforcing file type or size in the browser as a security control — accept is only a hint; validate on the server

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the file control (the drop zone is a label wrapping a visually-hidden but focusable native input)
Enter or Space opens the native file dialog — the single-pointer/keyboard alternative to dragging (WCAG 2.5.7)
Dragging files onto the zone is an optional enhancement; every action is available without it
Tab reaches each selected file's Remove button; Enter or Space removes that file and focus returns to the control
A disabled control is removed from the tab order and ignores drops
accessibility.targetSize: 44px project default (the drop zone is min-block-size 2.75rem; Remove buttons meet 44px)
